overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating a dystopian urban environment. The player crosses commercial streets, walks under elevated walkways past neon signs, and transitions into an industrial zone with large storage tanks before approaching an NPC for interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with commercial buildings and crosswalk

events.description: ego crosses the street from the corner, stepping onto the crosswalk
enters covered sidewalk area beneath the elevated metal walkway structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and turning onto the sidewalk, walking under the elevated structure

notable_agents.action: character wearing orange jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: Multi-story concrete commercial building with green neon trim and signage
Elevated pedestrian walkway structure with metal trusses spanning the street
Tall street light pole with orange glowing fixture
White striped pedestrian crossing painted on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a sunlit urban intersection with a large concrete building featuring green neon accents. The player character crosses the street and turns onto a sidewalk, entering the shadow of an elevated metal walkway structure while following a character in an orange jacket.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with concrete planters and neon signage

events.description: character in orange jacket ahead begins running down the sidewalk
passing colorful neon signs and a vending machine on the left

agents.ego_description: walking and then running to follow the character in orange along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: character in orange jacket running ahead, leading the way down the sidewalk

entered.detail: Large rectangular concrete planters containing dried vegetation lining the sidewalk
Single palm tree visible in the distance against the hazy skyline
Colorful neon sign with Japanese characters and blue-red coloring
Vending machine with 'PURE OVERKILL' branding and yellow neon display

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated metal walkway in diffused light, the player follows the character in orange who transitions from walking to running. The sidewalk features large concrete planters and the environment becomes more detailed with neon signage and a distinctive vending machine.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from commercial to industrial street with storage tanks visible

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection while traffic light is green
traffic light changes from green to red as ego finishes crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection and continuing along the sidewalk into a more industrial area

notable_agents.action: black car driving down the street past the intersection

entered.detail: Large cylindrical industrial storage tanks visible in the distance against the skyline
Metal chain link fence covered in graffiti running along the sidewalk edge
Traffic signal pole showing green light then changing to red

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from commercial to industrial as large storage tanks appear on the horizon. The player crosses a street at a traffic light, passing a chain link fence with graffiti, while the neon signs and planters of the previous zone fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with overhead pipes and storage facilities

events.description: slowing down to approach the NPC standing by the traffic light pole
talk interaction prompt appears as camera approaches the NPC for conversation

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial intersection and approaching an NPC standing by a traffic light pole to initiate conversation

notable_agents.action: standing by the traffic light pole waiting, facing the street

entered.detail: Network of overhead industrial pipes and metal walkways connecting buildings
Piles of bags and belongings indicating a homeless encampment against the fence

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a wide industrial intersection dominated by large storage tanks and overhead pipe networks. The player approaches an NPC standing by a traffic light pole, slowing down as a talk interaction prompt appears on screen to initiate dialogue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, commercial urban intersection into a gritty industrial zone. It begins at a sunlit street corner beside a concrete building with green neon accents, moving onto a sidewalk and entering the shadow of an elevated metal walkway while following a character in an orange jacket. As the character begins to run, the camera glides past concrete planters and glowing vending machines under the diffused light of the overhead structure. The scene then shifts from the commercial district to an industrial landscape, crossing a graffiti-covered chain link fence as the neon signs fade and large storage tanks appear on the horizon. Finally, the camera moves through a wide intersection dominated by overhead pipe networks, slowing down as the player approaches an NPC by a traffic light to initiate a dialogue.
